sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ مَدِينَةَ الْقَاهِرَةِ الْقَدِيمَةَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِي.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam stari grad Kairo sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: I visited the old city of Cairo with my friends.

sentences.translation: Vidjeli smo historijske džamije i narodne pijace.
sentences.translationEn: We saw historical mosques and traditional markets.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمْنَا خَرِيطَةَ الْمَدِينَةِ لِلْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْمَتَاحِفِ.
sentences.translation: Koristili smo mapu grada da potražimo muzeje.
sentences.translationEn: We used a city map to search for museums.

sentences.translation: Napravio sam mnogo fotografija prelijepih spomenika.
sentences.translationEn: I took many photos of the beautiful monuments.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَوْ حَارًّا لَكِنَّ الرِّحْلَةَ كَانَتْ مُمْتِعَةً.
sentences.translation: Vrijeme je bilo toplo, ali je putovanje bilo zabavno.
sentences.translationEn: The weather was hot, but the trip was enjoyable.
